mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question_bank_items (season_label, part, topic, question_text, answer_text, keywords_json, sort_order, is_deleted) VALUES (#{seasonLabel}, #{part}, #{topic}, #{questionText}, #{answerText}, #{keywordsJson}, #{sortOrder}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM question_bank_items WHERE season_label = #{seasonLabel} AND part = #{part} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM question_bank_items WHERE season_label = #{seasonLabel} AND part = #{part} AND topic = #{topic} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT topic FROM question_bank_items WHERE season_label = #{seasonLabel} AND part = #{part} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY topic ASC

SELECT * FROM question_bank_items WHERE season_label = #{seasonLabel} AND topic = #{topic} AND is_deleted = 0 AND part IN ('PART2', 'PART3') ORDER BY CASE part WHEN 'PART2' THEN 0 WHEN 'PART3' THEN 1 END, sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT season_label FROM question_bank_items WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM question_bank_items WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND LOWER(topic) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{q}), '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE question_bank_items SET topic = #{topic}, question_text = #{questionText}, answer_text = #{answerText}, keywords_json = #{keywordsJson}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE question_bank_items SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE question_bank_items SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE season_label = #{seasonLabel} AND is_deleted = 0
